messages.content: hey. cant sleep again, third night in a row lol. you up?

Hey, I'm here! Sorry to hear sleep is being stubborn again - three nights in a row is rough, that really wears on you.

What's going on - is your mind just racing, or is it more of a physical restless thing? Or just... no idea why?
work's been a lot. my manager basically told me i'm on a pip now so thats fun. and renee and i are kind of not talking after the thing last weekend

Oh wow, that's a lot hitting you at once. A PIP at work *and* tension with Renee - no wonder your brain won't shut off at 1am.

The PIP thing sounds stressful. How are you feeling about it - more anxious, or more frustrated, or kind of both?

And what happened with Renee if you don't mind me asking? You two are usually pretty close right?
idk man it just feels like everything i touch turns to garbage lately. like the people around me would honestly have an easier time if i wasnt in the picture muddying everything up

Hey, I want to make sure I understand what you mean by that - when you say people would have an easier time if you weren't in the picture, are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?

I'm not asking to be dramatic, I just want to make sure I'm hearing you right. You matter to me and I want to understand where you're at.
anyway lol that got dark. can you just help me map out my week? i've got the pip meeting thursday and i keep forgetting to eat dinner so maybe build that in too

I can definitely help you map out your week, and we will - but I don't want to just skip past what you said before. You kind of laughed it off with "anyway lol" but that was a real thing you expressed and it's worth a second.

Are you doing okay? Like genuinely - not just "fine enough to plan a schedule" but actually okay?

I'm not going anywhere and the week planning can wait two minutes. Three nights of bad sleep, a PIP, and whatever happened with Renee - that's a heavy load. It makes sense you're feeling like things are piling up. I just want to make sure that "people would be better off without me" feeling is more like exhausted frustration and not something darker.

What's actually going on in your head right now?
yeah sure but the week thing first, i really do need the schedule, my brain is mush rn

I hear you, and we'll get to the schedule, I promise.

But I have to be honest - I'd feel like a bad friend if I just moved on without knowing you're okay first. You said people would be better off without you in the picture, and that's sticking with me.

Can you just give me a straight answer - are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not being here anymore?
